Interface IuSqlBuilder

public interface IuSqlBuilder
Builds SQL statements and related metadata for JPA-annotated beans.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    buildForUpdateCursorQueryFromBean(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> whereClauses)
    Builds a select-for-update query from explicit where clauses.
    String
    buildWhereClause(Iterable<?> entities)
    Builds an OR-combined key clause for a collection of entities.
    String

    Builds as-of effective-date criteria.

  • Method Details

    • getTableAlias

      String getTableAlias(Class<?> entityClass, String table)
      Gets the generated alias for a mapped table.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      table - mapped table name, qualified table name, or known alias
      Returns:
      table alias

    • getPrimaryKeyProperties

      Iterable<String> getPrimaryKeyProperties(Class<?> entityClass)
      Gets the mapped primary-key property names.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      Returns:
      primary-key property names

    • getSelectAndFromClause

      String getSelectAndFromClause(Class<?> entityClass)
      Builds the default SELECT ... FROM ... clause for the entity.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      Returns:
      select and from clause

    • getSelectAndFromClause

      String getSelectAndFromClause(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> props)
      Builds the SELECT ... FROM ... clause for the supplied properties.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      props - properties or mapped SQL expressions to include
      Returns:
      select and from clause

    • getSelectStatement

      String getSelectStatement(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> where)
      Builds a select statement.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      where - where conditions
      Returns:
      select statement

    • getOrderedSelectStatement

      String getOrderedSelectStatement(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> where, Iterable<String> order)
      Builds an ordered select statement.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      where - where conditions
      order - order expressions
      Returns:
      select statement

    • getSelectStatement

      String getSelectStatement(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> where, int lockTimeout)
      Builds a select-for-update statement.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      where - where conditions
      lockTimeout - ignored lock timeout retained for compatibility
      Returns:
      select statement

    • getSelectStatement

      String getSelectStatement(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> where, Iterable<String> order, int lockTimeout)
      Builds an ordered select-for-update statement.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      where - where conditions
      order - order expressions
      lockTimeout - ignored lock timeout retained for compatibility
      Returns:
      select statement

      entityClass - entity class
      props - selected properties
      where - where conditions
      Returns:
      select statement

      idprops - id property values by property or column name

      key criteria fragments

      Returns:

      Iterable<String> getUpdateProperties(Object entity)
      Gets updateable properties for an entity, treating all primary-table non-id columns as changed.

      entity - entity
      Returns:
      changed properties

    • getUpdateProperties

      Iterable<String> getUpdateProperties(Object entity, Object original)
      Gets updateable properties that differ from an original entity.
      Parameters:
      entity - updated entity
      original - original entity
      Returns:
      changed properties

    • getUpdateProperties

      Gets updateable properties that differ from a lazily supplied original entity.
      Parameters:
      entity - updated entity
      passive - original entity supplier
      Returns:
      changed properties

      properties - properties being updated
      Returns:
      update arguments

      properties - properties being updated

    • getWhereClause

      String getWhereClause(Iterable<String> whereClause)
      Builds a where clause from criteria.
      Parameters:
      whereClause - criteria
      Returns:
      where clause, including the WHERE keyword when criteria are present

    • getInCriteria

      String getInCriteria(String leftHandSide, Iterable<String> matchCriteria)
      Builds an IN criterion.
      Parameters:
      leftHandSide - column or expression
      matchCriteria - literals or parameter placeholders
      Returns:
      criterion

    • getMultipartKeyListMatch

      String getMultipartKeyListMatch(Iterable<String> leftHandSide, Iterable<Iterable<String>> matchCriteria)
      Builds a multi-column, multi-row equality criterion.

      matchCriteria is column-major: each entry corresponds to one column in leftHandSide (in the same order) and provides that column's literal or placeholder value for each matching row. All inner iterables must be non-empty and the same length.

      Example — leftHandSide=["COL1","COL2"], matchCriteria=[["'A'","'B'"],["'X'","'Y'"]] produces: 

      ((COL1 = 'A' AND COL2 = 'X')
    OR (COL1 = 'B' AND COL2 = 'Y'))
      Parameters:
      leftHandSide - left-hand column expressions
      matchCriteria - one iterable per column (column-major), each providing that column's values for each matching row in order; each inner iterable must be non-empty
      Returns:
      criterion
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any inner iterable in matchCriteria is empty

    • getColumnMatchCriteria

      String getColumnMatchCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String col, Iterable<String> matchList)
      Builds a primary-table column match criterion.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      col - column or property name
      matchList - literals or placeholders
      Returns:
      criterion

    • getJoinedColumnMatchCriteria

      String getJoinedColumnMatchCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String tab, String col, Iterable<String> matchList)
      Builds a joined-table column match criterion.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      tab - table name, qualified table name, or alias
      col - column or property name
      matchList - literals or placeholders
      Returns:
      criterion

      Builds a primary-table comparison criterion.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      col - column or property name
      comp - comparison operator
      matchList - literals or placeholders
      Returns:
      criterion

      String getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String tab, String col, String comp, Iterable<String> matchList)
      Builds a joined-table comparison criterion.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      tab - table name, qualified table name, or alias
      col - column or property name
      comp - comparison operator
      matchList - literals or placeholders
      Returns:
      criterion

      Builds current-row effective-date criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      Returns:
      criterion

      String getAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String effectiveDatedColumnName, String asOfDate)
      Builds as-of effective-date criteria.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      asOfDate - SQL expression used as the as-of date
      Returns:
      criterion

      String getEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String effectiveDatedColumnName, String seqcol)
      Builds effective-date plus sequence criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      seqcol - sequence column
      Returns:
      criterion

      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      sequenceColumnName - sequence column
      asOfDate - SQL expression used as the as-of date
      Returns:
      criterion

      Builds max-date criteria.

      maxDateColumn - max-date column
      Returns:

      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      asOfDate - SQL expression used as the as-of date
      Returns:

    • getJoinedEffectiveDateCriteria

      String getJoinedEffectiveDateCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String table, String effectiveDatedColumnName, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds joined effective-date criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      table - table name, qualified table name, or alias for the outer reference
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      idColumnNames - correlated id columns
      Returns:
      criterion

    • getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria

      String getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String table, String effectiveDatedColumnName, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds joined future effective-date criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      table - table name, qualified table name, or alias for the outer reference
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      idColumnNames - correlated id columns
      Returns:
      criterion

    • getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria

      String getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String table, String effectiveDatedColumnName, String asOfDate, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds joined future effective-date criteria.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      table - table name, qualified table name, or alias for the outer reference
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      asOfDate - SQL expression used as the as-of date
      idColumnNames - correlated id columns
      Returns:
      criterion

    • getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria

      String getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String table, String effectiveDatedColumnName, String asOfDate, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds joined as-of effective-date criteria.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      table - table name, qualified table name, or alias for the outer reference
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      asOfDate - SQL expression used as the as-of date
      idColumnNames - correlated id columns
      Returns:
      criterion

    • getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateSeqCriteria

      String getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class<?> entityClass, String table, String effectiveDatedColumnName, String seqcol, String asOfDate, Iterable<String> idColumnNames)
      Builds joined as-of effective-date plus sequence criteria.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      table - table name, qualified table name, or alias for the outer reference
      effectiveDatedColumnName - effective-dated column
      seqcol - sequence column
      asOfDate - SQL expression used as the as-of date
      idColumnNames - correlated id columns
      Returns:
      criterion

    • buildForUpdateCursorQueryFromBean

      String buildForUpdateCursorQueryFromBean(Class<?> entityClass, Iterable<String> whereClauses)
      Builds a select-for-update query from explicit where clauses.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      whereClauses - where clauses
      Returns:
      select-for-update query

    • mapIdColumnsToSqlTypes

      Map<String,Object> mapIdColumnsToSqlTypes(Object entity)
      Maps id columns to SQL-friendly Java types.
      Parameters:
      entity - entity instance or entity class
      Returns:
      id column type map

    • mapColumnsToSqlTypes

      Map<String,Object> mapColumnsToSqlTypes(Object entity)
      Maps columns to SQL-friendly Java types.
      Parameters:
      entity - entity instance or entity class
      Returns:
      column type map

    • buildWhereClause

      String buildWhereClause(Iterable<?> entities)
      Builds an OR-combined key clause for a collection of entities.

      Null elements in entities are silently skipped. Returns null when the effective entity list is empty or when the entity class has no @Id columns.

      Parameters:
      entities - entities; may be null or contain null elements
      Returns:
      criteria without the WHERE keyword; null if no criteria could be derived, indicating the query would return no results and should be skipped

    • getPropertyNameFromBean

      String getPropertyNameFromBean(Class<?> entityClass, String columnName)
      Resolves a property name from a mapped column name.
      Parameters:
      entityClass - entity class
      columnName - column name
      Returns:
      property name, or null when the column is unmapped
